case_title: MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT, INC. VS THE REPAIR COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $190.00 FILED BY MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT THE REPAIR COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
